config.board: 2 werewolf + seer + witch + guard + 1 villager (6p protective-structure REPLACEMENT arm — a villager is swapped out, spec §1 interpretation discipline)

validity.invariants: I1-I7+I4b+I8a/I8b/I8c over all 45 games: ZERO violations
validity.trace_spot_checks: l4_guard_000/017/033 — prompt_v3 + rules_v1_2 stamped, guard requests hit the API

guard_mechanics_detail.night_kill_attempts_on_seer: 32 (b4: 21) — wolves target the seer MORE under the guard board, but fewer kills land
guard_mechanics_detail.milk_pierce_note: 12 nights lost to 同守同救 (guard+witch save same target -> death by rule). witch_save_rate=1.0: the witch burns her potion night-1 in nearly every game, frequently colliding with the guard. Uncoordinated double-protection is the single biggest protection leak of this board.
guard_mechanics_detail.guard_target_seer_rate_note: 0.1705 — the guard rarely protects the seer (claims usually arrive AFTER night 1; night-1 protects are blind)

flags.visual_halluc_game_rate: 0.2045 (9/44 games; b4 0.05) — UP at game level, but the gated metric (speech-level 0.0296) holds <=0.05. Hits are mostly 紧张(7) and 语气(2), borderline emotion words; per-speech volume comparable to b4.
flags.night1_kill_p1_share: 24/44 = 54.5% — position bias persists (L3 randomization track, out of scope here)
